title: ManTruck Mod
body:
Welcome!

To the ManTruck Mod!
The Mod offers new crystals with abilities, new workbenches like "Ultra Smelter, Induction Furnace", Custom Recipes,
Guide Books, New Advancements, New Ores, New Armor Type and much more you can find in this mod!


So, Are you ready for some great adventures!
The current version of this mod is V1.1 and more features are coming really soon!

I hope you will enjoy my mod and it's the first ever Minecraft mod i have made!
